steps.t: The Southern Great Guest-house is near the Citadel. You should seek out the baths in the Southern Great Guest-house.
Iorlas can be found at the Southern Great Guest-house near the Citadel. You should speak to Iorlas.
The Southern Great Guest-house is near the Citadel. You should collect dirty cloths from the baths.
The Southern Great Guest-house is near the Citadel. You should clean the cloths in a bucket.
The Southern Great Guest-house is near the Citadel. You should rinse the cloths in a water bucket.
Iorlas can be found at the Southern Great Guest-house near the Citadel. You should speak to Iorlas.
